name: 🔧 Skill Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or fixes for an existing skill
title: '[IMPROVE] <skill-slug> - <improvement-type>'
labels: ['enhancement', 'skill improvement']
assignees: []
---

## Skill Information | معلومات المهارة

**Skill Slug:** 
<!-- Example: arabic-email-drafter -->

<!-- Example: كاتب البريد الإلكتروني العربي -->

<!-- business | government | education | developer | healthcare | media | security | linguistics -->

## Type of Improvement | نوع التحسين

Select all that apply:

- [ ] 📝 Grammar/Spelling fix (Arabic or English)
- [ ] 🔄 Content update or expansion
- [ ] 🔑 Add more trigger keywords
- [ ] 📚 Add or improve examples
- [ ] 🧪 Add test cases
- [ ] 🏷️ Update frontmatter metadata
- [ ] 📖 Improve instructions or clarity
- [ ] 🌍 Add dialect variant (gulf/levantine/egyptian)
- [ ] 🔧 Fix compatibility issues with specific LLM
- [ ] Other: 

---

## LLM Testing | اختبار النموذج

- [ ] No, but I anticipate potential issues
- [ ] Not applicable (grammar/spelling fix only)

<!-- Example: Claude 3.5, GPT-4, JAIS -->

**Issues found:**
<!-- Describe any issues you encountered -->

## Priority | الأولوية

How would you rate the importance of this improvement?

- [ ] 🔴 Critical (skill doesn't work or has major errors)
- [ ] 🟡 High (significant improvement needed)
- [ ] 🟢 Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] ⚪ Low (minor enhancement)
